```erlang
-module(solution).
-export([solve/2]).

solve(nums, K) ->
    N = length(nums),
    Prefix = prefix_xor(nums),
    DP = create_dp(N, K),
    DP1 = fill_dp(DP, Prefix, K, N),
    lists:nth(N, DP1)[K].

prefix_xor([]) -> [0];
prefix_xor([H|T]) -> [0 | [H bxor X || X <- prefix_xor(T)]].

create_dp(N, K) ->
    [ [infinity || _ <- lists:seq(1, K+1)] || _ <- lists:seq(1, N+1) ].

fill_dp(DP, Prefix, K, N) ->
    DP1 = fill_base_case(DP, Prefix, N),
    fill_j(DP1, Prefix, K, N, 2).

fill_base_case(DP, Prefix, N) ->
    lists:map(fun(I) ->
        Row = lists:nth(I, DP),
        NewRow = [Prefix[I] | lists:sublist(Row, 1, K)],
        lists:replace(I, NewRow, DP)
    end, lists:seq(1, N)).

fill_j(DP, Prefix, K, N, J) when J > K ->
    DP;
fill_j(DP, Prefix, K, N, J) ->
    DP1 = fill_i(DP, Prefix, J, N, J),
    fill_j(DP1, Prefix, K, N, J+1).

fill_i(DP, Prefix, J, N, I) when I > N ->
    DP;
fill_i(DP, Prefix, J, N, I) ->
    MinVal = compute_min(DP, Prefix, J, I),
    Row = lists:nth(I, DP),
    NewRow = lists:sublist(Row, 1, J-1) ++ [MinVal] ++ lists:sublist(Row, J+1, K+1 - J),
    DP1 = lists:replace(I, NewRow, DP),
    fill_i(DP1, Prefix, J, N, I+1).

compute_min(DP, Prefix, J, I) ->
    M_start = J-1,
    M_end = I-1,
    lists:foldl(fun(M, Acc) ->
        Row = lists:nth(M, DP),
        Val = lists:nth(J-1, Row),
        CurrentXor = Prefix[I] bxor Prefix[M],
        CurrentMax = max(Val, CurrentXor),
        if Acc == infinity -> CurrentMax;
           true -> min(Acc, CurrentMax)
        end
    end, infinity, lists:seq(M_start, M_end)).
```
